text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, Oguri Cap calls me to the dance studio.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You came...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I came up with some choreography during my
dance lesson, but I can't figure out what to do for
the chorus.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you what I've come up with so far, so
please give me your honest opinion.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: How was it?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oguri-ness? Yeah, maybe that is what's missing.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the advice. So... What do you think I
should do?
choice_data_list: Do you have a favorite dance move?
Do you have a favorite dance move?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Actually, I do. It's called the banana dance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I search for "banana dance" online, and a video of
people dancing in festival coats comes up.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. We'd do this dance at our festivals back
home.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Every time I watch them all dancing to the festival
music, it cheers me up.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It might be a little unconventional for a winning
concert, but I really like this dance.
choice_data_list: Why not incorporate a few of its elements?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Good idea! Okay, show me that clip again.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Which part do you like? I'll try and incorporate it
into my choreography.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You're right... Seeing them move like that is super
energizing.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I like how they move after hitting the taiko drums
as well. Maybe if we combine the two...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that's perfect. All that's left for me to do
now is practice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When Oguri Cap shows off her perfected
choreography, she captivates everybody
watching with her forceful movements.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah... It's hard to take your eyes off them.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I like how they move after hitting the taiko drums
as well. Maybe if we combine the two...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that's perfect. All that's left for me to do
now is practice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When Oguri Cap shows off her perfected
choreography, she captivates everybody
watching with her graceful movements.
